2606.17871.title: StepGuard: Guarding Web Navigation via Single-Step Calibration
2606.17871.paper_summary: Web navigation requires agents to follow natural language goals, interact with web pages, and produce accurate answers. While recent advances leverage vision-language models and reinforcement learning, existing methods still suffer from single-step fragility due to reward misalignment and error propagation. To tackle the reward entanglement, we design Dynamic Dual-Policy Optimization (DDPO), which dynamically switches between a navigation-first mode for exploration and an answer-first mode for question-answering to mitigate reward conflict. To calibrate the single-step error, we propose Confidence-Guided Adaptive Navigation Reflection (CANR), a mechanism that estimates per-step confidence, triggers reflection only when necessary, and uses contrastive rewards to encourage self-correction to calibrate the single-step inaccuracy. With the above as the main components, we finally develop our StepGuard, a new framework of Guarding Web Navigation via Single-Step Calibration. Experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves navigation and answer accuracy, setting new state-of-the-art performance on standard web navigation benchmarks.
2606.17871.paper_summary_zh: 網頁導航要求代理遵循自然語言目標，與網頁互動，並產生準確的答案。儘管最近的進展利用了視覺-語言模型和強化學習，但現有的方法仍然因獎勵不一致和錯誤傳播而遭受單步脆弱性。為了解決獎勵糾纏問題，我們設計了動態雙策略優化（DDPO），該方法在探索的導航優先模式和問題回答的答案優先模式之間動態切換，以減輕獎勵衝突。為了校準單步錯誤，我們提出了信心引導的自適應導航反思（CANR），這是一種估計每步信心的機制，僅在必要時觸發反思，並使用對比獎勵來鼓勵自我修正，以校準單步不準確性。在上述作為主要組件的基礎上，我們最終開發了StepGuard，這是一個通過單步校準保護網頁導航的新框架。實驗表明，我們的方法顯著提高了導航和答案的準確性，並在標準網頁導航基準上設置了新的最先進性能。
2606.17871.author: Zhihao Cui et.al.
2606.17871.authors: Zhihao Cui, Yuchen Zhang, Xiyang Sun, Yaxiong Wang, Li Zhu, Jinpeng Hu, Liu Liu, Mengjia Li, Yujiao Wu
